nasb.text: But I say to you, do not resist an evil person; but whoever slaps you on your right cheek, turn the other to him also.

esv.text: But I say to you, Do not resist the one who is evil. But if anyone slaps you on the right cheek, turn to him the other also.

cnv.text: 可是我告訴你們，不要與惡人對抗，有人打你的右臉，把另一邊也轉過來讓他打；

ccb.text: 但我告诉你们，不要跟恶人作对。有人打你的右脸，连左脸也转过来让他打。

csbs.text: 但是我告诉你们：不要与恶人作对。有人打你的右脸，把左脸也转给他；
